name: Accidental reveal
description:
First bot of this year so yep a another forsaken bot....ok ik i said the vitacarnis was about to be next..but dunno how to start the scenario so you get this one until the bot is done.

Ok you might ask what this bot is about?

What if you were one of the survivors but unbeknownst to everyone including yourself you were like 1x a creation of shed which he was unaware existed (ok he was mostly that careless you ended up being adopted by normal robloxians) and yes this bot has the hc that shedlesky was telamon in the past.
creator: Infernix_the_entity
